summary: P0 In-Product Guided Experience Testing - Backend 13/13 PASS, Frontend 8/9 tests PASS. All 7 new funnel events accepted. Guide drawers for Continue Story, Story to Video, and Battle work correctly. localStorage flags persist. 'Don't show again' + Skip works. One issue: ActionHelpButton NOT rendering on StoryVideoStudio page (component imported but not in DOM).

ui_bugs.issue: ActionHelpButton component is imported and used in JSX at line 2757 but NOT rendering in DOM. The floating 'What should I do?' button is missing from /app/story-video-studio page.

details: Guide drawer [data-testid='action-guide-continue'] opens on first click
All sections present: ag-meaning, ag-steps (5 steps), ag-best-practices (3 bullets), ag-after-click, ag-avoid (2 bullets), ag-motivation
Primary CTA click closes drawer, sets localStorage.guide_seen_continue='1', fires continue_after_guide event, starts Part 2 generation
With localStorage.guide_seen_continue='1', clicking Continue Story does NOT open guide
Guide drawer [data-testid='action-guide-story_video'] opens on first click
Primary CTA click sets localStorage.guide_seen_story_video='1', opens VideoRewardPreview
Checking 'Don't show again' + clicking Skip sets localStorage.guide_seen_continue='1'
Enter Battle button has 'Best for reach' label inline
Component used in JSX at line 2757: <ActionHelpButton actionId='story_video' />
Button NOT rendering in DOM - [data-testid='action-help-button'] not found
Other floating buttons (chatbot-toggle, feedback-toggle, guide-bubble) ARE rendering
InstantStoryExperience instant demo paints first frame

action_items: FIX: ActionHelpButton not rendering on StoryVideoStudio page - component is imported and used in JSX but not appearing in DOM. Check if there's a conditional rendering issue or if the component is being unmounted.
critical_code_review_comments: ActionGuide.jsx: Well-structured config-driven component with 4 guide configs (story_video, remix, continue, battle)
useActionGuide hook correctly implements runWithGuide pattern with localStorage flag check
ActionHelpButton.jsx has correct data-testid but NOT rendering on StoryVideoStudio - needs investigation
All 7 new funnel events properly added to FUNNEL_STEPS in funnel_tracking.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 In-Product Guided Experience mostly working. Guide drawers for Continue Story, Story to Video, and Battle all work correctly with localStorage persistence. One bug: ActionHelpButton (floating 'What should I do?' button) is NOT rendering on /app/story-video-studio page despite being imported and used in JSX. The component exists at /app/frontend/src/utils/ActionHelpButton.jsx with correct data-testid='action-help-button'. Other floating buttons (chatbot-toggle, feedback-toggle) ARE rendering on the same page.
rca_of_the_issue: ActionHelpButton not rendering: Component is imported at line 3 of StoryVideoStudio.js and used at line 2757. The component file exists and has correct export. Possible causes: (1) React error during render that silently fails, (2) CSS z-index issue hiding the button, (3) Conditional rendering somewhere preventing mount. The button should appear at fixed position bottom-20 right-4 with z-40. Other fixed-position buttons ARE rendering, so it's likely a component-specific issue.
